mcqs.question: What is the primary purpose of the query-key-value triplet in self-attention?

options.text: Calculate attention weights and context-aware representations

mcqs.explanation: Queries attend to keys to compute weights, values create weighted context vectors.

mcqs.question: Which component enables transformers to understand token order?
mcqs.explanation: Positional encodings add sequential order information to embeddings.

mcqs.question: What is the computational complexity of self-attention for n tokens?
mcqs.explanation: Each token attends to all others, resulting in quadratic complexity.
